# terrible_community_general_scaleway_ip (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against
- `region` (String) Scaleway region to use (for example par1).

### Optional

- `id` (String) ID of the Scaleway IP (UUID).
- `organization` (String) Scaleway organization identifier. Exactly one of `project` and `organization` must be specified.
- `project` (String) Project identifier. Exactly one of `project` and `organization` must be specified.
- `reverse` (String) Reverse to assign to the IP.
- `server` (String) ID of the server you want to attach an IP to. To unattach an IP do not specify this option.
- `state` (String) Indicate desired state of the IP.

### Read-Only

- `data` (String) This is only present when `state=present`.
